name: Saltus Grammar School
description: Bermuda's most academically recognised independent school, offering co-education from pre-school through to IB Diploma and A-Levels. Strong university placement record (UK, US, Canada). Annual fees approximately $24,000 per student. Most relocating families with children place Saltus on their shortlist alongside The Bermuda High School and Warwick Academy. Application leads: plan 1–2 years ahead for competitive entry years.
